summary: Excellent matrix recording of an iconic 1972 show, highlighted by a jazzy Dark Star and a breathtaking closing Not Fade Away → Great… → Not Fade Away sequence.
review: The performance is hailed as one of the best of the ’72 era, featuring a soaring Dark Star, a moving Comes A Time, and an unforgettable triple‑close that left the audience in disbelief. The MTX (soundboard/audience) splice delivers crystal‑clear sound quality that many reviewers call “modern‑era” excellent, making this release a must‑listen for Deadheads.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are 5‑star and uniformly praise both the musical performance and the high‑quality matrix recording, giving strong evidence of an outstanding show with excellent audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Praised for crisp, modern‑era sound; successful soundboard/audience splice (sbd/aud) that preserves clarity and ambience throughout.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Massive setlist with strong momentum from start to finish; the closing Not Fade Away → Great… → Not Fade Away sequence is described as “paint‑peeling” and left the crowd in awe.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His guitar work on a jazzy Dark Star is highlighted as beautiful and exemplary.
